---
title: "Podcast"
description: "Puliyabaazi — a Hindi podcast on public policy"
toc: false
---

## Puliyabaazi पुलियाबाज़ी

I co-host **Puliyabaazi** — a Hindi-Urdu podcast, with my co-conspirators Saurabh Chandra and Khyati Pathak. We explain complex policy topics in accessible, conversational Hindi for a general audience. Episodes cover everything from the economy and governance to geopolitics and technology.

What began as a podcast has now spawned into a Hindi Substack and a magazine!

```{=html}
<div style="display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin:1.5rem 0;">
  <a href="https://puliyabaazi.in" class="btn btn-primary" target="_blank">Visit Puliyabaazi.in →</a>
</div>
```

---

## Listen on

::: {.listen-links}
[Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/5JVXED73qNjIT8n2nNMTFF){target="_blank"}
[Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/in/podcast/puliyabaazi-hindi-podcast-%E0%A4%AA-%E0%A4%B2-%E0%A4%AF-%E0%A4%AC-%E0%A4%9C-%E0%A4%B9-%E0%A4%A8-%E0%A4%A6-%E0%A4%AA-%E0%A4%A1%E0%A4%95-%E0%A4%B8-%E0%A4%9F/id1380601120){target="_blank"}
[Substack](https://puliyabaazi.in){target="_blank"}
[RSS](https://puliyabaazi.in/index.xml){target="_blank"}
:::

## We also make videos
[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@puliyabaazi){target="_blank"}

See a sample episode
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M_oaRm6o_FY>}}




---

## What we cover

- Indian political economy
- Foreign policy and strategic affairs
- Technology and digital governance
- Constitutional and institutional questions
- Ideas in economics, history, and political science
